positive: A whimsical and vibrant jungle scene, featuring stylized geometric monstera leaves, bright tropical florals, and charming cartoon-style monkeys swinging through vines. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a repeatable pattern print. Use a flat design aesthetic with strong black outlines and bold color blocking in lime green, turquoise, sunset orange, and deep teal. The style should evoke vintage mid-century illustration and modern Memphis design elements, ensuring clean silhouettes and high contrast against a crisp white background. Art Deco inspired pattern, isolated on white.
